scripts.deploy: npm run build --workspace @event-photo/web && XDG_CONFIG_HOME=${XDG_CONFIG_HOME:-/tmp} wrangler deploy -c wrangler.production.toml
scripts.deploy:dry-run: npm run build --workspace @event-photo/web && XDG_CONFIG_HOME=${XDG_CONFIG_HOME:-/tmp} wrangler deploy --dry-run -c wrangler.production.toml
scripts.db:migrate:remote: XDG_CONFIG_HOME=${XDG_CONFIG_HOME:-/tmp} wrangler d1 migrations apply event-photo-db --remote -c wrangler.production.toml
scripts.db:migrate: XDG_CONFIG_HOME=${XDG_CONFIG_HOME:-/tmp} wrangler d1 migrations apply event-photo-db --local
